nasb.text: To grant us that we, being rescued from the hand of our enemies, Might serve Him without fear,

esv.text: that we, being delivered from the hand of our enemies, might serve him without fear,

cnv.text: 把我們從仇敵手中救拔出來， 叫我們可以坦然無懼，用聖潔公義， 在他面前一生一世敬拜他。

ccb.text: 要把我们从仇敌手中拯救出来，

csbs.text: 使我们从敌人的手中被救出，
